29.reason: [When popping, the program should output the top element of the stack (which is at index i-1), but the original code does not print anything and instead sets a[i]=0, which is incorrect behavior.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [When popping, the program should output the top element of the stack (which is at index i-1), but the original code does not print anything and instead sets a[i]=0, which is incorrect behavior.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The original code does not print the popped element; it just sets a[i]=0 and decrements i. The problem requires outputting the popped value, which should be a[i-1] before decrementing.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [The original code does not print the popped element; it just sets a[i]=0 and decrements i. According to the problem, every pop operation (x==0) must output the popped value. The current code only handles printing for errors, not for successful pops.]
